page_metadata.biotools__summary: Resource for analysis of 3D protein structures including domain predictors, a protein fold similiarity server (PRIDE), and tools for calculating atom protusion (CX) and/or depth (DPX) indexes in 3D models.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Resource for analysis of 3D protein structures including domain predictors, a protein fold similiarity server (PRIDE), and tools for calculating atom protusion (CX) and/or depth (DPX) indexes in 3D models.
